name: segment
description: Segment is an extensible open-source messenger with end-to-end encryption.

scripts.check: node --check apps/server/src/index.js && node --check apps/server/src/gateway.js && node --check apps/server/src/auth.js && node --check apps/server/src/rooms.js && node --check apps/server/src/files.js && node --check packages/core/index.js && node packages/crypto/selftest.js && node apps/server/src/rooms.selftest.js && node apps/server/src/files.selftest.js && node packages/core/files.selftest.js && node packages/core/history.selftest.js
